scenes.narration: Merit week's coming, and you need to know who's below minimum, which managers earn less than their team, and what it'll cost to fix. ShiftWorks HR gives you that in about a minute.
Just drop your payroll export in — Workday, ADP, or any CSV. ShiftWorks maps your columns automatically. No IT project needed.
You get a full cycle-readiness view — critical flags, budget exposure, and every issue that could hold up merit, from below-minimum pay to compression and manager inversions.
Drill into below-minimum employees with names, departments, and exact dollar gaps — so you know what needs fixing before letters go out.
ShiftWorks flags manager inversions too — when someone earns less than the people they manage, you see both names and salaries side by side.
Gender and race median pay gaps are built in by group, using the demographic columns already in your export.
Location pay is covered too — median salary by office and how your workforce spreads across cities, all from the same upload.
When leadership wants a summary, one export gives you a PDF with risk level, total exposure, and the findings they'll press you on.
Try it free at shiftworkshr.com with your own roster. No credit card required.
